mapper.sql: a.id AS "id", a.config_name AS "configName", a.gift_guidelines AS "giftGuidelines", a.conversion_rate AS "conversionRate", a.status AS "status", a.is_non_pay_pwd AS "isNonPayPwd", a.remark AS "remark", a.create_by AS "createBy", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_by AS "updateBy", a.update_date AS "updateDate", a.remarks AS "remarks", a.del_flag AS "delFlag"
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM gift_config a
WHERE a.del_flag = "0" AND a.status = "1" ORDER BY a.create_date DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gift_config( id, config_name, gift_guidelines, conversion_rate, status, isNonPayPwd, remark, create_by, create_date, update_by, update_date, remarks, del_flag ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{configName}, #{giftGuidelines}, #{conversionRate}, #{status}, #{isNonPayPwd}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createDate}, #{updateBy}, #{updateDate}, #{remarks}, #{delFlag} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE gift_config
config_name = #{configName},
gift_guidelines = #{giftGuidelines},
conversion_rate = #{conversionRate},
status = #{status},
isNonPayPwd = #{isNonPayPwd},
remark = #{remark},
update_by = #{updateBy},
update_date = #{updateDate},
remarks = #{remarks},
WHERE id = #{id}
